splitBondSlashing(uint256,address).details: This function has the same signature as splitFee but is called specifically      by OptimisticResolver for bond slashing events.

params.dAppRecipient: Where to send the dApp's share (MarketFactory)
params.totalFee: Total fee amount in G$ from redemption

approveExpert(address).notice: Expert validation system for partnership revenue sharing.         Approved experts can validate prediction outcomes for additional UBI impact.

getMonthlyUBIEstimate().notice: Calculate estimated monthly UBI contribution.         Used for impact reporting and partnership validation.

getPredictUBIStats().notice: Get prediction market specific UBI statistics

setGoodDollar(address).notice: Update the GoodDollar token address when redeployed

splitBondSlashing(uint256,address).notice: Split bond slashing proceeds from OptimisticResolver.         Called when disputed resolutions are finalized by admin.

splitFee(uint256,address).notice: Split redemption fees from MarketFactory.         Called when users redeem winning prediction tokens.

documentation.text: @notice Interface expected by MarketFactory for redemption fee splitting
@notice Interface expected by OptimisticResolver for bond slashing

@notice Expert validation system for partnership revenue sharing.
         Approved experts can validate prediction outcomes for additional UBI impact.
@notice Update the GoodDollar token address when redeployed
@notice Get prediction market specific UBI statistics

@notice Calculate estimated monthly UBI contribution.
         Used for impact reporting and partnership validation.
